members.name: Alex

preparationRules.rule: Must be sliced thin and fully cooked through, no pink
Must be steamed, not raw or roasted

members.notes: ARFID-like constraints. Prefers components separated on the plate.

members.name: Jordan
members.notes: Flexible eater, avoids tree nuts due to allergy.

members.name: Riley

preparationRules.rule: Must be small shapes like penne or fusilli

members.notes: Picky eater. Will reject unfamiliar foods but sometimes accepts them on second exposure.

members.name: Sam

preparationRules.rule: Mash or cut into finger-safe strips

members.notes: 6 months, no teeth yet. BLW-style finger foods plus purees.
